_doc: Pre-registered decision thresholds, frozen BEFORE any headline curve per experiment/LONG_RANGE_EXPERIMENT_PLAN.md sections 1.5 and 3.3 (reliability: determinism >= 0.95, robustness >= 0.85, validity kappa >= 0.6). theta_commit / theta_read carried from refine-logs/EXPERIMENT_PLAN.md section 3. Sensitivity sweeps are reported after the curves, never used to re-pick values.
